subject: Phase 1 召回引擎重构与统一

key_conclusions.title: RRF 仅融合 content 通道
key_conclusions.detail: finalScore = RRF(bm25,vector) + structuralBoost(maturity/recency/locality 原常量);结构信号不进 RRF

key_conclusions.title: no-query 走旧 additive 路径
key_conclusions.detail: queryTerms.length===0 不碰新 fusion,行为不变

key_conclusions.title: W5 抽纯 ranker 非复用 planContext
key_conclusions.evidence: review.ts:1376 triage 语义 + plan-context.ts:352 corpus 不含 pending

key_conclusions.title: W2 截断重排降级
key_conclusions.detail: trimToPayloadBudget 尾裁(mcp-payload-guard.ts:99)已相关度正确;W2 保留瘦item+磁盘缓存

key_conclusions.title: W4 fastembed optionalDependencies
key_conclusions.detail: 默认尝试装(开箱即用)+ 装不上 server 仍成功 + 文本降级
key_conclusions.evidence: maestro package.json:58 硬声明 + embedding.ts:242 动态import;Fabric vector-retrieval.ts:40

recommendations.action: W1: entries[] 加 optional score + score_breakdown,更新 recallOutputSchema + round-trip 测试
recommendations.rationale: 可观测性基线,score 内部已算只是被 drop

recommendations.action: W2: 瘦 item 默认 + BM25 model 磁盘缓存(抽内部 stats key=revision hash)
recommendations.rationale: 瘦 item 减字节压力;磁盘缓存榨 hook 冷启动;截断重排不需要(已尾裁)
steps: 序列化 bm25.ts:82-125 内部 stats + rehydrate scoreDoc

recommendations.action: W3: RRF 仅融合 content + flag 门控(fusion:additive|rrf 默认 additive)+ shadow-ranker 测试(真实 team KB)跑绿翻默认
recommendations.rationale: 唯一 High 风险,flag 零风险回滚;真实语料强 oracle
steps: shadow-ranker dual-run 测试 no-query diff=空/query diff allowlist
config fusion 旋钮默认 additive

recommendations.action: W4: fastembed 进 optionalDependencies + 翻 embed_enabled 默认开 + 缺包文本降级提示
recommendations.rationale: CJK 语义一等目标;optionalDependencies 兼顾开箱即用与跨平台稳
steps: vector cosine clamp >0 + 修注释 vector-retrieval.ts:120/151

recommendations.action: W5: 抽 rankDescriptionItems 纯 ranker,fab_pending search triage mode 接入,删 searchEntries 子串
recommendations.rationale: 消除双 search drift;triage 完整性靠 no-floor mode 保
steps: 重套 isVisibleByLifecycle + layer/maturity/tags/created_after 过滤
triage mode 全匹配无 top_k/floor

implementation_scope.objective: 暴露召回 score + 信号分解
acceptance_criteria: fab_recall entries[] 每条含 score(数字)

implementation_scope.objective: 瘦 item + BM25 磁盘缓存榨冷启动
implementation_scope.rationale: 减字节压力 + hook 冷启动
acceptance_criteria: 默认返回瘦字段,胖 description 留 read_path
冷 hook 命中磁盘缓存跳过 BM25 重建
recall-perf 测试可见冷启动下降

implementation_scope.objective: RRF content-only 融合 + flag 门控
implementation_scope.rationale: 量纲对齐排序;High 风险需安全上线
acceptance_criteria: content scale 压过 locality 非命中(test:1203 绿)
shadow 测试用真实 team KB

implementation_scope.objective: CJK 语义召回默认开 + fastembed optionalDependencies
acceptance_criteria: 缺 fastembed server 仍启动 + 文本降级 + 一次性提示

implementation_scope.objective: fab_pending 统一接入纯 ranker + 删 searchEntries
implementation_scope.rationale: 消双 search drift,triage 保完整
acceptance_criteria: rankDescriptionItems 纯 ranker 带 mode
triage mode 全匹配无 floor(不漏)

decision_trail: 目标=选择性对齐 maestro 知识检索半套(上游 grill)
RRF content-only(双源收敛,否决 naive RRF-all/z-score)
W2 截断重排降级(校验尾裁已正确,推翻 grill 误杀判断)
W3 flag 门控真实语料验证后翻默认(用户)
W4 optionalDependencies 综合默认装+跨平台稳(用户倾向+maestro 证据)
W5 纯 ranker triage mode 保完整性(双源收敛 D14)

open_questions.question: RRF 的 k 值与 content scale 系数具体校准
options: 用真实 team KB shadow 测试反推

open_questions.question: BM25 磁盘缓存失效粒度
options: 整体 revision hash 失效(先)
